LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.TextureFallback.Tip: Substitutes a generated placeholder for any texture that fails to load, instead of returning null (which freezes/crashes screens). Headline feature — recommended ON.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.LogDoctor: Enable Log Doctor (explain errors in plain language)
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.Tier.Max: Maximum — rewrite/disable broken defs (via override mod)
